avalancheActivity.comment: The avalanche risk is low. In a few places at high altitudes, old and fresh snowdrift accumulations can be triggered as small slab avalanches in steep and shady gullies and bowls. Due to icy surfaces, the risk of falling is greater than the avalanche risk in many places.
avalancheActivity.highlights: Low avalanche danger, but watch out for older wind slabs in the north and east aspects!

snowpackStructure.comment: There is still significantly less snow than average. Rain has moistened the surface of the snowpack. At the highest elevations, small, fresh pillows of wind drifted snow have formed, especially on the north side. Where there is a snow base, fundament (shady areas at high altitudes), angular snow crystals are still weakening the stability of the snowpack.

tendency.highlights:
On Friday, the sun will shine temporarily on the mountains, but in the afternoon it will become overcast again from the west.
The avalanche risk remains low.

weatherForecast.comment:
The night into Thursday will bring the occasional snowflake or raindrop, but no significant amounts of new snow are expected. During the day, the higher peaks will be covered in cloud, but it will remain largely free of precipitation.
The temperature at an altitude of 1500 metres will be around 0 degrees. The wind will blow moderately to briskly from the south-east.

avalancheActivity.comment: The avalanche risk is low. Occasional small, spontaneous wet snow slides can occur. There is a risk of falling on icy sections.
avalancheActivity.highlights: Low avalanche danger, very little snow.

snowpackStructure.comment: There is still significantly less snow than average. The thin snowpack is mostly wet or icy.

tendency.highlights:
On Friday, the sun will shine temporarily on the mountains, but in the afternoon it will become overcast again from the west.
The avalanche risk remains low.

weatherForecast.comment:
The night into Thursday will bring the occasional snowflake or raindrop, but no significant amounts of new snow are expected. During the day, the higher peaks will be covered in cloud, but it will remain largely free of precipitation.
The temperature at an altitude of 1500 metres will be around 0 degrees. The wind will blow moderately to briskly from the south-east.

ALBINA.generalHeadline: Low avalanche danger, but still isolated avalanche prone locations!
